_comment: ACD territory reference for the Spatial Radar. Extracted from the Web Revenue Tracker. East/West is the high-level split. territory_presets maps each territory code to its state/province list. Note the documented account-level overrides for MA (BSA vs NEA) and MD (NIH vs MDA) which a state-only lookup cannot resolve on its own.

rep_owners._comment: Territory code to rep owner, used to stamp an owner on each item so the dashboard and the email digest can show who should act. Confirmed from the Web Revenue Tracker territory map. Edit when assignments change. Items with no single owner (National, Unmapped, or an unresolved MA/MD account split) get no owner.

account_level_overrides._comment: State-only lookup cannot resolve these. Applied by institution name where possible.

MA.NEA: Broad Institute, MIT, UMass, and all other MA accounts

MD.MDA: Johns Hopkins, University of Maryland, and other MD accounts

notes: RBA (OH, IN, KY) is marked in the source tool as a placeholder pending a final state list.
NCA and SCA are California-based but grouped under West (West means non-East, not strictly geographic).
State name to code normalization (full names and Canadian provinces) is handled in the script.
